heading: Today
text: Morning sun giving way to clouds south to north.  Snow or valley rain developing near the MA border midday, spreading north to Rt. 2 late, up to an inch.  Milder.  Highs in the 30s.  Winds light east, mainly south 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Town Meeting Day (VT)
text: Morning sun giving way to clouds south to north.  Snow or valley rain developing near the MA border midday, spreading north to Rt. 2 late, up to an inch.  Milder.  Highs in the 30s.  Winds light east, mainly south 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Tonight
text: Snow south of the Adirondacks and Rt. 2, possibly mixed with sleet or rain far south.  Accumulations 1 to 4 inches, up to 6 in central NH.  A chance of snow farther north, up to an inch.  Lows in the 20s.  Winds south near 10 mph, gusting to 20 mph from the Green Mountains west, diminishing to light.

heading: Wednesday
text: Clearing through the morning, becoming mostly sunny in the afternoon.  Milder.  Highs in the 40s, near 40 far north, and 50 in the warmer valleys south.  Winds light and variable.
